name: Honey Grilled Pork
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients (except pork) in a blender.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. Pierce the pork on all sides.
4. Place the pork in a zip-lock bag and add the marinade.
5. Chill, turning frequently, about 12 hours.
6. Grill for 1-1/2 hours, covered.
7. Start with high heat to brown the roast for about 15 minutes.
8. Reduce heat to low and baste frequently with marinade.
9. Remove from heat and allow to rest at least 10 minutes before slicing.
10. Place additional whole sprigs of rosemary on the coals while cooking for added aroma.
